data.content:
This is an NUnit project running on VSTest. Use `--filter` with the fully qualified class name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

Or the shorter form filtering by class name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName=Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

Both will run only the 2 tests in `ReportExporterTests`, skipping `ReportGeneratorTests`.
